name: Lynas Rare Earths Ltd
content: Lynas Rare Earths is the world’s largest producer of rare earths outside of China. It operates the high-grade Mt Weld mine in Western Australia and a major chemical processing facility in Kuantan, Malaysia. Lynas is a critical supplier of NdPr (neodymium and praseodymium) used in high-strength permanent magnets, essential for the global energy transition and advanced electronics.
